title: lindsaea parkeri subsp. steyermarkiana
intro: Lindsaea parkeri subsp. steyermarkiana, also known as the Styermark's fern, is a subspecies of the Lindsaea parkeri species, a type of fern that belongs to the Lindsaeaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in the Andean region, to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties. The health benefits associated with Lindsaea parkeri subsp. steyermarkiana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion by boiling its leaves in water, or as a decoction by simmering its roots and rhizomes in water, to harness its medicinal properties.
